T0074.title: Precision Data
T0074.definition: In illicit data trading, refers to personal information or account credentials that have been meticulously filtered and verified, possessing extremely high authenticity.
T0074.description: This data often includes detailed contact information, asset status, or specific consumption records, cleaned and annotated by specialized groups. Fraudsters exploit its high accuracy to conduct targeted phishing or business fraud, with success rates far exceeding ordinary data. In underground market transactions, this data is often sold at a high price per record and is a core tool leading to substantial financial losses.
